news.t: It's a Good Time to Consider Short Duration Bond ETFs

overview.description: The JPMorgan Short Duration Core Plus ETF (JSCP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in a portfolio of global fixed income securities of varying credit quality, and aims for a duration of three years or less. JSCP was launched on Mar 1, 2021 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.

data.title: It's a Good Time to Consider Short Duration Bond ETFs
data.text: Ten-year Treasury yields closed at 4.57% on May 21 and have roughly tripled over the past five years. Making matters worse for investors evaluating longer-dated bonds and the related ETFs, is that the...
